case_meta.summary: BOTIFY token on Solana exhibits multiple high-severity rug-pull indicators: anonymous team, no locked liquidity, coordinated shill campaigns, and abrupt social media abandonment post-launch. Eight independent claims corroborated by screenshot evidence.

sources.caption: Twitter/X shill campaign — coordinated bot replies boosting $BOTIFY
Telegram pump group — pre-launch insider buy signals for BOTIFY
DexScreener liquidity chart — LP withdrawn < 30 min after launch peak
Solscan wallet cluster — 7 wallets pre-funded from same source 2h before launch
Rugcheck.xyz report — Mint Authority NOT revoked, Freeze Authority active
Website WHOIS — domain registered same day as token launch, no team doxxing
Holder distribution — top 3 wallets hold 62% of supply (insider accumulation)
Social media abandonment — all official channels silent after day 5 post-launch

claims.title: Coordinated Shill Campaign
claims.description: Multiple bot accounts posted identical promotional content within minutes of each other, displaying classic coordinated pump behaviour.

claims.title: Insider Pre-Launch Pump Signal
claims.description: Telegram group messages show buy signals distributed to insiders 45 minutes before public token listing, enabling front-running.

claims.title: Liquidity Withdrawal < 30 min Post-Peak
claims.description: On-chain data confirms the deployer wallet removed 100% of liquidity from the primary Raydium pool within 28 minutes of the price peak, causing a 97% collapse.

claims.title: Pre-funded Wallet Cluster (Sybil)
claims.description: Seven wallets received identical SOL amounts from a single source wallet 2 hours before launch. All seven sold at peak within a 90-second window.

claims.title: Mint & Freeze Authority Not Revoked
claims.description: Rugcheck.xyz confirms mint authority and freeze authority both remain active on the token contract, allowing the deployer to mint unlimited supply or freeze any holder wallet.

claims.title: Anonymous Team / Same-Day Domain
claims.description: Project website domain was registered on the same day as token launch. No team identities, CVs, or verifiable social accounts exist. WHOIS data is privacy-protected.

claims.title: Whale Concentration — Top 3 Wallets Hold 62%
claims.description: At peak, the top 3 holder wallets controlled 62% of circulating supply, indicating extreme insider accumulation and the ability to crash price at will.

claims.title: Social Media Abandonment Post-Launch
claims.description: All official BOTIFY social channels (Twitter, Telegram, Discord) went completely silent on day 5 after launch. No developer responses to community distress signals.
